en: "Can you draw out Leviathan with a fishhook or press down his tongue with a cord?
zh: “你能用魚鈎釣上鱷魚嗎？ 能用繩子把牠的舌頭壓下嗎？

en: Can you put a rope in his nose or pierce his jaw with a hook?
zh: 能把草繩穿進牠的鼻子嗎？ 能用刺鈎穿透牠的腮骨嗎？

en: Will he make many pleas to you? Will he speak to you soft words?
zh: 牠會向你再三懇求， 對你說溫柔的話嗎？

en: Will he make a covenant with you to take him for your servant forever?
zh: 牠肯與你立約， 好使你永遠奴役牠嗎？

en: Will you play with him as with a bird, or will you put him on a leash for your girls?
zh: 你怎能玩弄牠，像玩弄雀鳥一樣呢？ 怎能把牠拴住，給你的幼女取樂呢？

en: Will traders bargain over him? Will they divide him up among the merchants?
zh: 結夥的漁夫怎能拿牠當貨物買賣呢？ 怎能把牠分給商人呢？

en: Can you fill his skin with harpoons or his head with fishing spears?
zh: 你能用倒鈎扎滿牠的皮嗎？ 能用魚叉扎滿牠的頭嗎？

en: Lay your hands on him; remember the battle- you will not do it again!
zh: 你把手按在牠身上， 想到與牠的戰鬥，你就不再是這樣作了。

en: Behold, the hope of a man is false; he is laid low even at the sight of him.
zh: 人希望捉住牠是徒然的， 人一見牠，就心驚膽戰。

en: No one is so fierce that he dares to stir him up. Who then is he who can stand before me?
zh: 人惹牠的時候，牠不是很兇猛嗎？ 這樣，有誰人在我面前能站立得住呢？

en: Who has first given to me, that I should repay him? Whatever is under the whole heaven is mine.
zh: 誰先給了我，以致我要償還呢？ 天下萬物，都是我的。

en: "I will not keep silence concerning his limbs, or his mighty strength, or his goodly frame.
zh: 論到鱷魚的四肢和牠的力氣， 以及美好的體態，我不能緘默不言。

en: Who can strip off his outer garment? Who would come near him with a bridle?
zh: 誰能揭開牠的外皮呢？ 誰能進入牠上下兩顎之間呢？

en: Who can open the doors of his face? Around his teeth is terror.
zh: 誰能打開牠的口呢？ 牠的牙齒令人戰慄。

en: His back is made of rows of shields, shut up closely as with a seal.
zh: 牠的背有一行一行的鱗甲， 緊緊合閉著，像印得很緊的印章一樣。

en: One is so near to another that no air can come between them.
zh: 這鱗甲一一相連接， 連氣也透不入其間，

en: They are joined one to another; they clasp each other and cannot be separated.
zh: 鱗甲一一互相連合， 互相緊貼，不能分離。

en: His sneezings flash forth light, and his eyes are like the eyelids of the dawn.
zh: 牠打的噴嚏閃出光來， 牠的眼睛如同清晨的陽光；

en: Out of his mouth go flaming torches; sparks of fire leap forth.
zh: 有火從牠的口中發出， 火星四射；

en: Out of his nostrils comes forth smoke, as from a boiling pot and burning rushes.
zh: 有煙從牠的鼻孔裡冒出來， 像從沸騰的鍋中和燒著的蘆葦裡冒出來一樣；

en: His breath kindles coals, and a flame comes forth from his mouth.
zh: 牠的氣可以點著煤炭， 有火燄從牠的口裡噴出來，

en: In his neck abides strength, and terror dances before him.
zh: 牠的頸項上存著能力， 驚恐在牠面前跳躍。

en: The folds of his flesh stick together, firmly cast on him and immovable.
zh: 牠下垂的肌肉緊貼在一起， 牢牢地貼在身上，不能搖動。

en: His heart is hard as a stone, hard as the lower millstone.
zh: 牠的心堅實如石頭， 如下磨石那樣堅實。

en: When he raises himself up the mighty are afraid; at the crashing they are beside themselves.
zh: 牠一起來，勇士都驚慌， 因驚惶過度舉止失措。

en: Though the sword reaches him, it does not avail, nor the spear, the dart, or the javelin.
zh: 追上牠的刀劍都沒用， 矛槍、標槍、短槍也是這樣。

en: He counts iron as straw, and bronze as rotten wood.
zh: 牠把鐵當作乾草， 把銅當作朽木。

en: The arrow cannot make him flee; for him sling stones are turned to stubble.
zh: 弓箭不能使牠逃跑， 甩石機弦在牠看來不過是碎稭。

en: Clubs are counted as stubble; he laughs at the rattle of javelins.
zh: 棍棒被牠當作碎?， 短槍颼颼之聲牠也譏笑。

en: His underparts are like sharp potsherds; he spreads himself like a threshing sledge on the mire.
zh: 牠的腹下像銳利的瓦片， 牠在泥上碾過如同有利釘的耙犁田一樣。

en: He makes the deep boil like a pot; he makes the sea like a pot of ointment.
zh: 牠使深淵沸騰， 牠攪動海洋如在鼎中調製膏油。

en: Behind him he leaves a shining wake; one would think the deep to be white-haired.
zh: 牠使自己行過的路發出白光， 令人把深淵當作白髮老人。

en: On earth there is not his like, a creature without fear.
zh: 在世上沒有一樣像牠的， 牠是無所懼怕的動物；

en: He sees everything that is high; he is king over all the sons of pride."
zh: 所有高大的動物，牠都藐視， 牠在一切狂傲的野獸之上作王。”
